ofm.title: OnlyFans 2026 crackdown intensifying
ofm.summary: Biometric verification, AI detection tools, and 30-40% revenue drops for violators now standard. DMs still drive 60-70% of income — and AI chatbots can't match human emotional connection. The real money? Selling courses about AI models, not running them. [b9-agency.com](https://b9-agency.com/blog/how-to-create-ai-onlyfans-model-2026)

ofm.title: OnlyMonster dominates OFM tooling
ofm.summary: Rapidly becoming the go-to management system and desktop browser for agencies. AI assistance integrated into workflow. Outpaced competitors during Beta without even a website or promos. [onlymonster.ai](https://onlymonster.ai/)

ofm.title: Supercreator is the AI hub for creators
ofm.summary: One dashboard for chats, fans, sales, and team management. Consider testing against your current stack. [supercreator.app](https://www.supercreator.app/)

ofm.title: Fanvue raised $22M Series A
ofm.summary: (Feb 2026): Expanding AI agents for fan interactions + ethical safeguards (Hive deepfake detection). Direct-to-fan subscriptions at 20% platform fee, $12.50 average subscription. This is your AI model platform if you're testing that lane. [bizjournals.com](https://www.bizjournals.com/bizjournals/news/2026/02/25/fanvue-seriesa-ai-expansion-creator-monetization.html)

ofm.title: Fanvue AI creator earnings benchmark
ofm.summary: Successful creators typically earn $500-5,000/month after 3-6 months consistent posting. Need followers BEFORE monetization — IG/TikTok/X/Reddit drive traffic to Fanvue. [apatero.com](https://www.apatero.com/blog/fanvue-complete-guide-ai-creators-monetization-2026)

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.22 just dropped
tools.summary: 45 new features, 13 breaking changes, 82 bug fixes. Plugin API compatibility checks now work properly. Worth reviewing the changelog for tools you use. [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases)

tools.title: Claude Code worktree isolation
tools.summary: Subagents can now use worktree isolation to work in parallel without conflicts. Add `isolation: worktree` to agent frontmatter or ask Claude to "use worktrees for your agents". [code.claude.com](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/common-workflows)

tools.title: Claude Code scheduled tasks
tools.summary: `/loop` command now runs nightly deployments, daily tests, weekly security audits. Build complex automation systems by combining skills, subagents, and external integrations coordinated by orchestrator agent. [popularaitools.ai](https://popularaitools.ai/blog/claude-code-scheduled-tasks-autonomous-agents-2026)

tools.title: Multi-agent orchestration frameworks emerging
tools.summary: GitHub repos like `Claude-Code-Workflow` (JSON-driven) and `awesome-claude-code` (curated skills list) show the ecosystem maturing. Worth scanning for OFM automation patterns. [github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code](https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code)

market.title: Puerto Escondido entering investment phase
market.summary: "El destino está entrando en una etapa donde el interés ya no se explica solo por estilo de vida o turismo, sino por una mezcla más concreta de conectividad, demanda y expectativa de crecimiento ordenado." Early mover window is closing. [elheraldodesaltillo.mx](https://elheraldodesaltillo.mx/2026/03/06/puerto-escondido-se-recalienta-por-que-crece-el-apetito-de-inversion-en-la-costa-de-oaxaca-en-2026/)

market.title: Airport expansion accelerating
market.summary: International routes from Houston already operational (spring 2025), additional Canadian and US connections planned for 2026. Airport designed by Alberto Kalach. Your move timing (May 2026) aligns with this inflection. [realestate.puerto-escondido.mx](https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-real-estate-market-trends-2026-investment-opportunities-on-oaxacas-pacific-coast/)

market.title: Puerto Escondido construction costs
market.summary: Currently $12,000-18,000 MXN per m² ($700-1,050 USD/m²) for quality builds. Still significantly below comparable coastal markets. Factor this into your Hilltop Villa budget. [realestate.puerto-escondido.mx](https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/los-tamarindos-puerto-escondido-up-and-coming-neighborhood-guide/)

market.title: Earth USA 2026 conference
market.summary: Rammed earth/adobe event Sept 18-20 in Santa Fe, New Mexico. Network with Sirewall-adjacent builders and material suppliers. Could connect you to Mexico-region expertise. [earthusa.org](https://www.earthusa.org)

market.title: Tulum ATV rental competition
market.summary: Viator, TripAdvisor, and "Tulum ATV Rental" (tulumatvrental.com) all active. Lagoon Company still ranks well in search. No major new entrants detected, but monitor pricing.
